new_failure_text: Broken release after deploy: readiness probes failing with connection refused; deployment ready=false and metrics up=0

metadata.remediation: runtime.restart after human approval, then rollback

incidents.text: Postgres connection pool exhausted during traffic spike; API returned 503 while connections waited
Transient DNS resolution failure caused intermittent upstream 502s across the gateway
TLS certificate expired on ingress; clients saw handshake failures and browser warnings
